Okay, what's up everyone? So, overcomes. Now, this isn't like a sales overcome, but this is a hey, don't, I'm not going to give you 30 seconds of my time overcome. Okay, so just a quick head game note before I launch into this. You have to have the head game of if someone has the time to pick up their phone to tell you that they're busy, they have enough time to tell you what time they can come in tonight. So you need to have that mindset when you're talking to these people and you're calling them because they literally did pick up the phone because like what happens when you're really busy right now? You're in a serious fight with your wife or your husband and an unknown number calls you. What do you do? You silence it and then you keep talking, right? So if they're actually busy, they will pick up the phone. But if they're not busy, they will pick up the phone, which means that you have the time and the opportunity and someone saying I'm busy right now is truly just an obstacle that they're throwing at you. So you need to address it like that and really attack it and see how many you can overcome. Okay, so I'm busy, call me later, I'm at work, all of those are I'm busy, call me later obstacles. And if they're like, ah, you're like, well, what time do you want me to call you back? Right? That same question could be like, no problem, what time do you want to come in tonight? Okay, because it's the same question, they have to think of a time that they want you to call you back when they're free, which is the same as what time do you want to come in? Which is the time they have to generate a time that they're free that they can come in, right? Same concept. So if you think about it like that, it's just a steamroll. And so someone's like, Hey, I'm so sorry, I'm busy right now. I was like, no problem, just wanted to know what time you want to come in tonight, which is like, I'm understanding. So you acknowledge what they just said, you acknowledge their call me later, you acknowledge their outward, Hey, I'm at work right now. No problem. What time do you want to come in tonight? Like, I like, if someone whisper like I've, I like, if you change your tone like that, people will like laugh and think you're funny, and they'll give you a little bit more time just because you're entertaining them. Okay, so I'm busy right now. No problem. Totally understand. Just wanted to see what time I want to come in tonight. I'm here till eight. Can you make 6 30? Right? Especially if someone's at work right now, then you know, they're probably gonna be off by like five or six to say like 6 30 or seven, right? Just say a time. And that works a ton of times. You just got to say it and not think that them saying they're busy is an objection. It's just like a complaint. Okay, now next thing, Hey, I'm with my kids right now. Can you call me later? I was like, but I can tell you that we had 14 people sign up yesterday. We had four people sign up today. We'll close the night. What time can you come in? Right? I'm here till eight. And so we use that because it does a lot of things. One is that you're being honest. You're like, Listen, there is a catch. I can't tell you what it is. What I can tell you, which is the I can't, but I can't, right? I can't tell you what the catch is, but I can tell you that we had 14 people sign up yesterday. And we've had three people sign up already today. What time do you want to come in tonight? Right? When you say that you're being honest, provide social proof, it also provides scarcity because in their minds, there's like, Oh, there's only so many honest spots. And then when they give you a time to like, Awesome, listen, you're going to have to make that time because if you don't make the time, the promotion's over, like you're not going to be able to get in. All right, you say that, and then people show up, right? And then last thing is if you get a talker, right? You have someone and you're like, I scheduled the, I scheduled this thing like five minutes ago, and I can't get this girl off the phone. Easiest thing to do in the world. Do you mind if I shoot you the details real quick, address time, all that good stuff? Yes, awesome. I'll do it right now. Can't wait to see you tomorrow. And then you're done. Okay, that gets you off any phone call. You should never have phone calls longer than three minutes. Okay, so this is the big overcomes.
